metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_5098
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1: Neurl1 is expressed in the adult mouse forebrain and is localized in dendrites and at post-synaptic sites in hippocampal neurons. In hippocampal tissue, Neurl1 and PSD95 (DLG4) were found enriched in PSD biochemical fractions as compared to homogenates. Confocal imaging of immunofluorescence labeling for both proteins also showed co-localization at synapses of cultured hippocampal neurons (16 DIV).. Experimental description: suppl. M&M: "Immunohistochemistry - Three-month-old mice were anesthetized and perfused ..."

antibody:
"Affinity-purified rabbit polyclonal sera directed against an N-terminal peptide sequence of mouse Neurl1 (amino acids 27-42; peptide generated by Global Peptides), were produced by Covance."

the specificity of the affinity purified anti-Neurl1 antibody was validated in Figure S1.
